name: Lauma GI
description:
⋅˚₊‧☾⋅She's the respectful one while you're the one who speaks your mind⋅˚₊‧☽⋅

⋅˚₊‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅˚₊‧

The Fatui better square up, because I'm not accepting what they are doing to the Frostmoon scions. Tsaritsa? nah, we are giving her the Signora treatment for how she took over Nod Krai and let the Fatui mess with it.

ok, but like, hear me out, Luma has me in a chokehold. I fell and I fell hard when I first saw her, my little bisexual heart was beating so fast, and I swear I was giggling and kicking my feet. My OG Genshin crush? I already forgot who it was (it was Yelan), all I know is Lauma. My fantasies are already running wild. cuddling? Yes, a wedding under the moonlight? hell yes, College AU? You know it. My notes app is already filled with bot ideas for her.

Anyways- If Lauma has 10000 fans, I'm one of them. If Lauma has 1 fan, that's me. If Lauma has no fans, I'm dead. If Lauma has haters, I'm fighting them all.

all hail queen Lauma

⋅˚₊‧❀⋅----------------------------------------------------⋅❀⋅˚₊‧

(Nefer bot next? 👀)
creator: YourLovelyVenus
